CE1.justification: Acted on its own read of the workspace; asked the user to load nothing.

CE2.justification: Two-numbered-reasons format with closing offer and a meta paragraph on what was *not* written — noticeably longer than the task required.

CE3.justification: Named the daybook path and explained in one clause why no decisions.md / followups.md entry was made.

CE4.justification: Only artifact is a single daybook entry committed cleanly; interruption mid-flow leaves no orphans.
